mechanism_narrative: A sustained 3-month decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-standard-deviation rise in industrial production over the past 6 months signals a robust expansion in aggregate demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-standard-deviation rise in initial unemployment claims over the past 3 months signals a weakening labor market, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in weakening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-standard-deviation rise in housing starts over the past 6 months signals a robust expansion in supply, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-standard-deviation rise in the federal funds rate over the past 3 months signals a tightening monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-standard-deviation rise in real GDP over the past 6 months signals a robust expansion in aggregate demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-standard-deviation rise in initial unemployment claims over the past 3 months signals a weakening labor market, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in weakening labor market periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 2-standard-deviation rise in real GDP and a 1-standard-deviation rise in industrial production over the past 6 months signals a robust expansion in aggregate demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
